visual_description: A close-up shot focuses on a digital map displayed on a screen. The map is rendered in a dark blue and black color scheme. A location is highlighted, showing Chinese characters for "Building" and a set of coordinates, "A 033 1634 05". A white marker is positioned over this highlighted area. In the top left corner of the frame, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. The camera remains static, tightly framing the digital interface. The audio opens with a tense, suspenseful electronic score, creating a feeling of urgency and impending danger. The scene cuts to a medium shot of two men in a dimly lit, green-hued room. The man on the right, with his back partially to the camera, has spiky, bleached-blonde hair and wears a light-colored suit jacket. He gestures with his hand as he speaks to the man on the left. The second man, facing the camera, has dark hair and wears a black and white polka-dot shirt. In the background, a red diamond-shaped decoration with Chinese calligraphy hangs on a dark wall, and framed pictures are visible on a tiled wall. The white text "风行网" remains in the top left
